name: HRR_TMPL_METRIC_CONFIG
description: This mapping table is child table of HRR_DASHBOARD_TMPLS_B and it maps HRR_DASHBOARDS  table and HRR_TMPL_ANALYTIC_TYPES_B table.

columns.Name: USE_AS_AXIS_FLAG
columns.Comments: Dashboard template metric flag for use as axis option

columns.Name: METRIC_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key to this table.

columns.Name: USE_AS_UNDERLAY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Dashboard template metric flag for use as underlay option

columns.Name: READ_ONLY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Dashboard template metric flag for read only option

columns.Name: METRIC_CODE
columns.Comments: The metric or rating type which will be mapped in this row.

columns.Name: CONTENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Content type id of the rating which will be mapped in this row.

columns.Name: DASHBOARD_COLUMN_NAME
columns.Comments: This indicates column name in HRR_DASHBOARDS table which will be storing the value for the particular METRIC_CODE.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SECTION_ID
columns.Comments: Section id introduced for the custom talent ratings .
